resourceTemplates.name: bluesky-profile
resourceTemplates.title: Get Bluesky profile
resourceTemplates.description: Returns public Bluesky profile information by `handle`.

resourceTemplates.name: bluesky-user-posts
resourceTemplates.title: Get Bluesky user posts
resourceTemplates.description: Returns posts from a Bluesky user. Use either `handle` or `user_id`, and prefer `user_id` for faster responses. `user_id` is the Bluesky DID. Supports pagination with `cursor` when returned by the API.

resourceTemplates.name: bluesky-post
resourceTemplates.title: Get Bluesky post
resourceTemplates.description: Returns details for a Bluesky post by public URL.
